notes: IFS 1.0.14 - the 4D display is now fixed at 9600 8N1 EVERYWHERE (was defaulting to 115200): hardcoded on the manual connect, the auto-connect/auto-reconnect, and the UI; any stale 115200 persisted from an older build is healed to 9600 on load. Verified on hardware (9600 = clean telemetry, 115200 = silent). Opta/servo stay 115200. Signed (Augeas Technologies).
